# Glossary Template

## Purpose

Use this template to maintain a shared vocabulary.

## Template Body

```md
# Glossary

## Terms

| Term | Definition | Scope / Level | Related Terms | Do Not Confuse With | Source / Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| <Term> | <Short definition> | Container / Direction / Service | <Terms> | <Terms> | <Optional note> |

## Related Documents

- [<Document title>](<relative-link>)
```
